name: Old Gregor

special_abilities.name: Superstitious
special_abilities.desc: Gregor knows all the old folk remedies against evil — garlic, salt lines, iron nails above doorways. His knowledge is a mix of truth and nonsense, but some of it works against vampires.

special_abilities.name: Drunk
special_abilities.desc: Gregor has been drinking steadily. He has disadvantage on Dexterity checks and saving throws, but speaks freely about things sober men wouldn't.

actions.name: Handaxe
actions.desc: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) slashing damage.

description: A grizzled old farmer with a ruddy face and thick peasant accent. Gregor lives in a village two hours down the road and came to the Hart to drink and avoid his daughter-in-law. He knows local legends about the mountains — strigoi, cursed lords, and roads that 'eat travelers.' He's terrified but too drunk and stubborn to show it.
